heading: Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges1So in original. Probably should be “names”.1
label: 70907 Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges1So in original. Probably should be “names”.1
text: The FFA and its authorized chapters and associations of chapters have the exclusive right to use the names “Future Farmers of America” and “National FFA Organization,” and the initials FFA as representing an agricultural education membership organization and seals, emblems, and badges the FFA adopts.2So in original. The comma preceding the closing quotation marks probably should not appear.2
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7090736:286., .Aug. 30, 1950, ch. 823, § 1664 Stat. 566The words “duly”, “sole”, and “lawfully” are omitted as unnecessary.

Amendments2019— substituted “FFA” for “corporation” in two places, “names” for “name”, and “ ‘Future Farmers of America’ and ‘National FFA Organization,’ ” for “ ‘Future Farmers of America’ ” and inserted “education” before “membership”.Pub. L. 116–7
